questions.question: Who is the main protagonist who becomes the vessel for Sukuna?
questions.explanation: Yuji Itadori swallows one of Ryomen Sukuna's fingers and becomes his vessel.

questions.question: What is the name of Gojo Satoru's barrier technique that stops attacks from touching him?
questions.explanation: Infinity (Mukagen) is the base state of Gojo's Limitless technique, slowing down things as they approach him so they never touch.

questions.question: Who was the Principal of Tokyo Jujutsu High who created Panda?
questions.explanation: Principal Masamichi Yaga created Panda, who is an Abrupt Mutated Cursed Corpse.

questions.question: What grade Jujutsu Sorcerer is Yuta Okkotsu classified as?
questions.explanation: Yuta Okkotsu is one of the very few registered Special Grade Jujutsu Sorcerers due to his immense cursed energy.

questions.question: Which Cursed Technique does Megumi Fushiguro inherit from the Zenin Clan?
questions.explanation: Megumi uses the Ten Shadows Technique, allowing him to summon Shikigami using shadows as an intermediary.
